category_sources: Official Dagger docs describe it as a platform for automating software delivery that runs locally, in CI, or in the cloud.
source_facts.description says Dagger is a portable devkit for CI/CD pipelines.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dagger; official docs and homepage branding use Dagger.
docs_sources: Official Dagger documentation is hosted at docs.dagger.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/dagger/dagger, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Dagger docs describe programmable, local-first, repeatable software delivery using containers and SDKs.
source_facts.description says it is for CI/CD pipelines.
